channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Short-Lived Libertarian Experiment of Minerva Reefs
item.description: In the early 1970s, American real estate magnate Michael Oliver attempted to create a libertarian utopia by claiming the remote Minerva Reefs in the South Pacific. Inspired by the counterculture era a...

item.title: President Zardari and PM Shehbaz review Pakistan’s security and regional challenges
item.description: On Monday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met President Asif Ali Zardari to review Pakistan’s national security situation in the context of the ongoing war in Iran. The meeting followed a quadrilateral...

item.title: Global Oil Prices Soar Amid Rising Tensions Between US and Iran
item.description: The wahala for Middle East don make oil price jaga-jaga as it hit $117 per barrel. This na because US dey think say e fit carry out ground attacks against Iran’s Gulf islands, while Israel and Iran st...

item.title: Trump Urges Iran to Halt Uranium Enrichment Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: In a recent statement covered by The Wall Street Journal, former U.S. President Donald Trump declared that Iran would need to surrender its uranium as part of any future agreement aimed at reducing te...

item.title: Exmouth continues recovery after Cyclone Narelle
item.description: Exmouth, a well-known tourist town in Western Australia, is facing significant challenges after being struck by Cyclone Narelle over the weekend. Local authorities and residents are working tirelessly...

item.title: Deputy PM Ishaq Dar to visit China amid Pakistan's efforts for regional diplomacy
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar is scheduled to travel to China on March 31 following an invitation from Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi. This visit comes as Pakistan ...

item.title: Kiren Rijiju clarifies FCRA amendment debate ahead of Kerala Assembly elections
item.description: Ahead of the Kerala Assembly elections, Union Minister Kiren Rijiju has responded strongly to allegations from the Congress and Left parties, who labelled the recent amendment to the Foreign Contribut...

item.title: Manitoba refuses name-change request for trans refugee due to ID requirements
item.description: Martha Hozha, a 25-year-old Ukrainian refugee in Manitoba, has been unable to change her legal name to reflect her gender because the provincial government does not accept her refugee protection ID. A...

item.title: Brief bursts of vigorous activity linked to lower risk of eight major diseases
item.description: A large international study analyzed data from nearly 96,000 UK Biobank participants to examine how the balance between total physical activity and its intensity affects health outcomes. Researchers f...

item.title: PCCB recovers billions and exposes major international bank card fraud network in Tanzania
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM: The Prevention and Combating of Corruption Bureau (PCCB) has reported significant achievements in fighting corruption across Tanzania, saving more than 14.5bn/- and exposing a large-sca...

item.title: TRA enhances monitoring and taxation system to ensure fair fuel distribution across Tanzania
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) has confirmed that the country’s fuel supply remains stable and that recent challenges are not the result of shortages. The TRA Commissioner General, Mr Yusuph Mwe...

item.title: Over 100 People Killed and Thousands Displaced as Floods Devastate 30 Counties in Kenya
item.description: The ongoing heavy rains across Kenya have led to serious flooding that has now claimed 110 lives and affected 30 counties. The Interior Ministry announced that Nairobi remains the worst hit, with 37 f...

item.title: Global markets tumble as Houthi attacks and Iran conflict push oil prices past $117
item.description: Crude oil prices spiked to around $117 a barrel on Monday amid growing instability in the Middle East as Yemen's Houthi rebels announced fresh missile and drone strikes on Israel. The attacks signalle...

item.title: <non-clickbait, descriptive title based on content>
item.description: <a fresh rewrite of the article between 200 and 500 words, highlighting the key points and context>

item.title: ACT firefighters raise safety concerns over $1.6–$2 million hybrid electric fire truck
item.description: An ACT Fire and Rescue firefighter and the United Firefighters Union have raised serious concerns about the country’s first hybrid electric fire truck. Reported issues include excessive cabin noise in...

item.title: In crises, shared sacrifice: the Philippines’ energy and economic response amid Middle East tensions
item.description: The article discusses rising global concern over stagflation as economies face slow growth combined with high inflation, driven in part by disruptions like the Strait of Hormuz closing. In the Philipp...

item.title: Pakistan’s Tax Burden on the Middle Class and Entrepreneurs
item.description: The article by Ehsan Malik in Dawn examines how Pakistan’s taxation policies are placing excessive pressure on salaried professionals and entrepreneurs who form the backbone of the formal economy. The...

item.title: AI Tools Demand High Standards of Accuracy for Legal Professionals
item.description: The Globe Content Studio highlights the growing role of artificial intelligence (AI) in Canada’s legal profession, emphasizing the need for accuracy, reliability, and trust. In 2025, 80 percent of leg...

item.title: PDP convention signals readiness to field candidates in 2027, says Saraki
item.description: Bukola Saraki, the former President of the Nigerian Senate, spoke at the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) national convention in Abuja, stressing that the party’s factional convention demonstrated its r...

item.title: Novo Nordisk Scientist Questions User Reports of Side Effects with GLP-1 Drugs
item.description: Novo Nordisk's chief scientist, Lotte Bjerre Knudsen, is downplaying concerns circulating online regarding the side effects experienced by some users of GLP-1 medications like Ozempic and Wegovy. Thes...
